headline: FTSE 100 Live: London stocks turn higher as 3i and banks give lift
summary: 9.12am: FTSE quickly turns higher The FTSE 100 has quickly turned things around, now up 14 points to 10,475. As well as the 9% gain for 3i Group, banks, housebuilders, travel companies and copper miners are helping. Barratt Redrow and Persimmon are up 4.4% and 2.6%, while IAG is and IHG...
